title: AI UI Card component with collapsible sections and customizable styling
purpose: Provides a reusable card container with optional title, subtitle, footer, and collapsible functionality. Supports customization of border color, background, elevation, and dark mode styling.
module_context: Exports a Card component that accepts various props for content, styling, and behavior. Includes helper function for determining elevation shadow classes and uses React state for managing collapsible state.

steps.content: Map the elevation number to a corresponding Tailwind shadow class.
Return the appropriate shadow class based on the elevation value.
Default to 'shadow' class when elevation is not provided or invalid.
Initialize the collapsed state using the initialCollapsed prop.
Return null if the hidden prop is true.
Construct custom style objects for border and background colors.
Determine the elevation shadow class based on the elevation prop.
Render the card header with title and subtitle if present.
Render the collapse button in the header when collapsible is enabled.
Render the card content section when not collapsed.
Render the card footer when footer content is provided and not collapsed.
